code:
%%{HealthTech_LabAnalyzer}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-09.01 — Knowledge Ingestion Pipeline (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)

[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> DISCOVER : SourceDiscovered
note right of DISCOVER
  Discover new sources:
  • hub/project outputs, repos, web docs, datasets
  • governance & treasury artifacts
  • manual submissions or connectors
end note

DISCOVER --> INGEST : SourceSelected
note right of INGEST
  Fetch & stage raw content (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
  • capture provenance (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
  • store raw blob refs for audit
end note

INGEST --> PARSE : SourceFetched
note right of PARSE
  Content extraction & normalization
  • text, tables, code blocks, media metadata
  • language detect, mime routing
end note

PARSE --> DEDUP : Parsed
note right of DEDUP
  De-duplication & canonicalization
  • simhash/LSH near-duplicate checks
  • keep canonical doc id
end note

DEDUP --> ENTITY_LINK : Deduped
note right of ENTITY_LINK
  NER + entity resolution:
  • link to DID, project, hub, proposal, stream
  • add typed edges with confidences
end note

ENTITY_LINK --> EMBED : EntitiesLinked
note right of EMBED
  Embedding & feature generation:
  • domain-specific models
  • chunking + vector store write
end note

EMBED --> INTEGRATE : EmbeddingGenerated
note right of INTEGRATE
  Integrate into graph:
  • apply ontology constraints
  • validate schemas & ids
end note

INTEGRATE --> SYNTH : Integrated
note right of SYNTH
  Synthesis:
  • summaries, explanations, citations
  • produce derived notes & insights
end note

SYNTH --> PUBLISH : KnowledgeUpdated
note right of PUBLISH
  Publish to consumers:
  • Metrics (HealthTech_PatientRecords), UI (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer), API (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
  • expose search/RAG endpoints
end note

PUBLISH --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync] : Published

%% ---- Quality review & human-in-the-loop ----
EMBED --> REVIEW : LowConfidence / DriftDetected
ENTITY_LINK --> REVIEW : AmbiguousLink
REVIEW --> EMBED : ReEmbed
REVIEW --> ENTITY_LINK : FixLinking
REVIEW --> REJECTED : NotRelevant
REJECTED --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]

%% ---- Failure & recovery paths ----
INGEST --> FAILED : FetchError / AuthError
PARSE --> FAILED : ExtractError / UnsupportedFormat
INTEGRATE --> FAILED : SchemaMismatch / ConstraintViolation
FAILED --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords] : IngestionFailed

%% ---- Maintenance / indexing ----
PUBLISH --> UPDATE_INDEX : BuildIndexes
UPDATE_INDEX --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] : IndexReady

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DISCOVER,INGEST,PARSE,DEDUP,ENTITY_LINK,EMBED,INTEGRATE,SYNTH,PUBLISH,REVIEW,REJECTED,FAILED,UPDATE_INDEX core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech的诊断引擎设计一个知识摄入流水线。核心是从各种源头发现数据，最终同步到EMR系统。我想先确认整体流程：从DISCOVER开始，经过INGEST、PARSE，一路到PUBLISH，最后落地到HealthTech_EMR_Sync。
明白了，主流程是线性的状态转换。我注意到INGEST阶段涉及HealthTech_PatientRecords和HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault，这里的合规审计要求是不是需要特别强调？比如捕获来源信息、存储原始blob引用。
对，HIPAA合规是关键。INGEST阶段必须记录数据来源，原始内容要留痕。接下来PARSE阶段做内容提取和规范化，包括文本、表格、代码块，还要做语言检测和MIME路由。
好的，我在PARSE后面加上DEDUP状态。去重和规范化用simhash/LSH做近似重复检测，保留规范的文档ID。然后进入ENTITY_LINK做实体解析。
ENTITY_LINK要支持NER和实体解析，把内容链接到DID、项目、hub这些实体，还要加上带置信度的类型化边。之后进入EMBED做向量嵌入，用领域专用模型，分块后写入向量存储。
EMBED之后是INTEGRATE，应用本体约束、验证schema和ID。然后SYNTH做合成，生成摘要、解释和引用，产出派生笔记。最后PUBLISH输出到Metrics、UI和API。这里UI对应HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，API对应HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault对吗？
没错，Metrics也是落到HealthTech_PatientRecords。PUBLISH要暴露搜索和RAG端点。另外，我们需要质量审核的人工介入回路——当EMBED检测到低置信度或漂移，或者ENTITY_LINK遇到模糊链接时，都要进入REVIEW状态。
已添加REVIEW分支。从REVIEW可以回到EMBED重新嵌入，或者回到ENTITY_LINK修正链接，也可以走向REJECTED。REJECTED最终也同步到HealthTech_EMR_Sync，标记为未采用。
还需要考虑失败恢复路径。INGEST可能遇到FetchError或AuthError，PARSE可能有ExtractError或不支持的格式，INTEGRATE可能出现SchemaMismatch或约束违反。这些都进入FAILED状态。
FAILED之后呢？是直接进入HealthTech_EMR_Sync标记失败，还是需要重试机制？
先简单处理，FAILED直接到HealthTech_PatientRecords记录IngestionFailed。另外，PUBLISH之后还需要UPDATE_INDEX来构建索引，索引准备好后落到HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。

完成。现在检查一遍状态转换：SourceDiscovered、SourceSelected、SourceFetched、Parsed、Deduped、EntitiesLinked、EmbeddingGenerated、Integrated、KnowledgeUpdated、Published。还有LowConfidence/DriftDetected、AmbiguousLink、ReEmbed、FixLinking、NotRelevant、FetchError/AuthError、ExtractError/UnsupportedFormat、SchemaMismatch/ConstraintViolation、IngestionFailed、BuildIndexes、IndexReady。
等等，REJECTED的转换标注有问题。你写的是直接到HealthTech_EMR_Sync，但应该明确标注转换条件。另外，INGEST到FAILED的触发条件里，AuthError应该包含在FetchError里还是分开？我们分开更清晰：FetchError和AuthError并列。
已修正。REJECTED到HealthTech_EMR_Sync的转换条件现在标注清楚，INGEST的失败触发也保持FetchError和AuthError并列。所有核心状态应用了统一的样式：橙色填充、粗体白色文字。标题定为SM-09.01 — Knowledge Ingestion Pipeline (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)。
完美。这个状态图覆盖了知识摄入的完整生命周期，包括主流程、质量审核回路、失败处理和索引维护。HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault在多个环节参与，确保合规性贯穿始终。可以定稿了。
